description: Ion wasm tail-call stack alignment bug - local and temporary slots for wasm tail calls were packed without enforcing WasmStackAlignment. The vulnerable Ion frame-layout code in js/src/jit/shared/CodeGenerator-shared.cpp could move the stack pointer too far during return_call/return_call_indirect, letting callee stack arguments overwrite caller locals or temporaries. Baseline wasm already aligned these slots; the fix applies the same alignment requirement to Ion local-slot allocation.

fixes.description: Bug 1862473 - Align local slots for wasm tail calls. r=rhunt
